title: Amtech - Multi-Function Drill Bit Set for Home DIY, Easily Drills through Tiles, Glass, Wood, and More, Durable, Compatible with Most Standard Drills, Clean and Accurate Holes (Set of 5)
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: VERSATILE DRILLING SET: The Amtech 5 Piece Drill Bit Set is perfect for drilling through a wide range of materials, including ceramic tiles, glass, granite, marble, porcelain, wood, brick, and concrete.
TUNGSTEN CARBIDE TIPS: Each drill bit is equipped with a durable tungsten carbide tip, providing enhanced strength and long-lasting performance, even on tough materials.
MULTI-MATERIAL CAPABILITY: This set is designed to effortlessly drill through both hard and soft materials, making it a versatile addition to any toolkit.
5 ESSENTIAL SIZES: The kit includes 5 drill bits in the following sizes: 5mm, 6mm, 8mm, 10mm, and 12mm, ensuring you have the right bit for various applications.
PRECISION AND DURABILITY: Engineered for precise drilling, these bits offer excellent control and durability, making them ideal for professional and DIY use.
description: Product Description Compatible with most standard drills, the set drills through various materials, including ceramic tiles, glass, granite, marble, porcelain, wood, brick, and concrete. The durable tungsten carbide tip provides enhanced strength and ensures accurate, clean holes. The set is easy to use and ideal for both professionals and DIYers. The set includes various sizes so that you have the right bit for your task: 1 x 5mm 1 x 6mm 1 x 8mm 1 x 10mm 1 x 12mm
